channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 24th March
item.description:
Loads of bags of rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brailsford Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pothole on Woodside Road, 24th March
item.description:
Very large pothole by the junction of Woodside and Shirley Road. For reference the box in the photo is 30cmx15cm and fits in the pothole and then some.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Woodside Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture flytipped in Harboyr Road, 24th March
item.description:
At side of Casa de mofongo. Put there over the weekend. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 171, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 ft pothole, 24th March
item.description:
In middle of road and dangerous for motorcycle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green chain walk sign dropped to head height, 24th March
item.description:
The directional Green Chain Walk sign has slipped down to head height. The fixings are loose and can no longer support the sign.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eaglesfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3ft pothole, 24th March
item.description:
Been here ages and caused car to drive on opposite side to avoid

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and rubbish dumped all along Amesbury Avenue, 24th March
item.description:
Outside 96-106 and further down near 56
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amesbury Avenue, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish on the road and pavement, 24th March
item.description:
This has been here for some time, and is getting larger. Previously reported as cleared, but it hasn’t been

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large quantity of household rubbish partially blocking the pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Margaret Road is frequently used for dumping rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipped sofa, 24th March
item.description:
A sofa has been fly tipped on the corner of Crewys Road and Lulworth Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and bed frame dumped, 24th March
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Carpet dumped on verge, 24th March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing sounds not working at night, 24th March
item.description:
The pedestrian crossing on Clapham Road (opposite Stirling Road) is not working properly at night for visually impaired people. For some reason there is no sound when the crossing is activated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped by food waste bin, 24th March
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes near the junction of Loop Road and High Street, 24th March
item.description:
These potholes have been getting bigger for weeks now. They are even dangerous for pedestrians crossing Loop Road. This busy junction is not wide enough for vehicles to avoid the potholes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Centre Common Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 18 Glengall Rd, 24th March
item.description:
Pavement in very sad condition with a decent sized pothole

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leak in street., 24th March
item.description:
This has been leaking for a long time and nothing is being done to fix it. And there's another leak in the building on the same side, slightly further back.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ripon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 Glengall Rd, 24th March
item.description:
Paper, plastic rubbish left on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus Stop (Plympton Avenue) & Pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Someone has painted all over the pavement outside of the businesses & also on the seats of the bus stop. Paint has been spread on the road & down the pavement due to people walking over it & spreading it as it’s wet.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 24th March
item.description:
Buses having to swerve around it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Wotton Green, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
